recommendations.title: Flee
recommendations.overview: Recounted mostly through animation to protect his identity, Amin looks back over his past as a child refugee from Afghanistan as he grapples with a secret he’s kept hidden for 20 years.

recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: The Book Thief
recommendations.overview: While subjected to the horrors of WWII Germany, young Liesel finds solace by stealing books and sharing them with others. Under the stairs in her home, a Jewish refugee is being sheltered by her adoptive parents.

recommendations.title: The Other Side of Hope
recommendations.overview: A restaurateur befriends a Syrian refugee who  has recently arrived in Finland.

recommendations.title: The Insult
recommendations.overview: After an emotional exchange between a Lebanese Christian and a Palestinian refugee escalates, the men end up in a court case that gets national attention.

recommendations.title: Alita: Battle Angel
recommendations.overview: When Alita awakens with no memory of who she is in a future world she does not recognize, she is taken in by Ido, a compassionate doctor who realizes that somewhere in this abandoned cyborg shell is the heart and soul of a young woman with an extraor

recommendations.title: The Cathedral
recommendations.overview: Story of a pilgrim who comes to the Cathedral on the border of the known world. He wants to find answers. He finds tranquility.

recommendations.title: The Lake House

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: The Next Doctor
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, TV Movie, Mystery, Adventure, Fantasy

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: The Runaway Bride
recommendations.overview: A young bride in the midst of her wedding finds herself mysteriously transported to the TARDIS. The Doctor must discover what her connection is with the Empress of the Racnoss's plan to destroy the world.
